empty.title: You don't have any storages yet
empty.description: Create your first storage to centralize your inventory and optimize operations across your business.
empty.noStoragesSubtitle: Create your first storage to start managing your inventory
empty.noResults: No storages found with that name
empty.noResultsSubtitle: Check that the search term is correct or try a different filter.
empty.noTypeResultsSubtitle: Create your first {{type}} and start centralizing your inventory for this area.
empty.noFilterResultsSubtitle: Try selecting a different status or clearing your search.

valueCards.centralizationDesc: All your inventory in one place, accessible from anywhere.
valueCards.optimizationDesc: Automate restocking and reduce waste with smart alerts.
valueCards.rolesPermissionsDesc: Control who can see and manage each storage area.

suggestionCards.checkSpellingDesc: Make sure the search terms are spelled correctly.
suggestionCards.adjustFiltersDesc: Try removing some active filters to broaden results.
suggestionCards.createNewDesc: If it doesn't exist yet, create a new storage now.

archived.title: No archived storages
archived.description: When you archive a storage it will appear here, and you can restore it at any time.

error.title: We couldn't load your storages
error.description: Something went wrong while loading your storages. This may be a temporary issue.

troubleshooting.connectionDesc: Make sure you're connected to the internet.
troubleshooting.refreshDesc: Sometimes a simple refresh solves the problem.
troubleshooting.supportDesc: If the problem persists, our team can help.

upgrade.title: Upgrade your plan to unlock more storages

tierLimit.title: Plan limit reached
tierLimit.description: Upgrade to create more storages of this type.

banner.title: Unlock the full potential of your storages
banner.description: Get unlimited storages, advanced roles, and more with a premium plan.

archiveModal.title: Archive storage
archiveModal.description: Are you sure you want to archive {{name}}? It will no longer appear in active views.
archiveModal.lastActiveWarning: This is the last active {{type}} storage. You cannot archive it.

restoreModal.title: Restore storage
restoreModal.tierLimitWarning: Restoring this storage would exceed your tier limit for {{type}}.

errors.nameTaken: A storage with this name already exists

toast.restoreTierLimit: Cannot restore: your current plan does not support more storages of this type.
toast.restoreOffline: You are offline. Try again once you are back online.

statusFilter.archivedHint: Archived storages can be restored from each card's menu.

createDrawer.title: New storage
createDrawer.subtitle: Configure the details for your new storage.
createDrawer.step1Subtitle: Select the category that best describes this space.
createDrawer.step2Subtitle: Complete the basic information for this storage.
createDrawer.warehouseDesc: Space dedicated to long-term merchandise storage with mass stock control.
createDrawer.storeRoomDesc: Agile storage area for daily supplies and frequent product rotation.
createDrawer.customRoomDesc: Define specific parameters for non-conventional or mixed spaces.
createDrawer.namePlaceholderWarehouse: E.g. Central Warehouse, North Distribution Warehouse
createDrawer.namePlaceholderStoreRoom: E.g. Back store room, Emergency stock
createDrawer.namePlaceholderCustomRoom: E.g. Downtown Store, Polanco Branch, Counter
createDrawer.fixedIconWarehouse: Warehouse type does not allow customization.
createDrawer.fixedIconStoreRoom: Store Room type does not allow customization.
createDrawer.tierLimitWarning: You already have {{count}}/{{max}} {{type}} in your {{tier}} plan. Upgrade to add more.
createDrawer.serverError: We couldn't create the storage. Check your connection and try again. Your data was not lost.
createDrawer.nameTakenError: A storage with that name already exists. Choose a different one so your team can tell them apart.
createDrawer.cancelConfirmBody: You will lose all entered data. This action cannot be undone.

editDrawer.title: Edit storage
editDrawer.subtitle: Modify the details of this storage.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters
errors.nameDuplicate: A storage with this name already exists

toast.error: Could not save changes. Check your connection and try again.

unsaved.title: Discard changes?
unsaved.description: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your changes will be lost.

warnings.iconChange: Changing the type will reset the icon and color to the default values.
warnings.historyAffected: Activity history will reflect the type change.
warnings.customLost: Custom icon and color will be lost when switching to a fixed type.
warnings.tierLimit: You have reached the limit for {{type}} in your {{tier}} plan.

pendingTypeChange.banner: You are changing the type: {{from}} → {{to}}. Customize the data and save to apply.

switcher.noStorages: You don't have any storages yet

banners.frozen: This storage is frozen. It cannot receive or dispatch merchandise.
banners.archived: This storage is archived. You can only view its history — it can no longer operate or receive merchandise.

permanentDelete.title: Delete "{{name}}" permanently?

consequences.heading: The following will be permanently lost:

input.label: Type "{{name}}" to confirm
input.error: Name does not match. Type it exactly as shown above.

error.network: We couldn't delete the storage. Check your connection and try again.

concurrent.title: This storage was already deleted
concurrent.body: Someone else on your team deleted "{{name}}" before you did. The list will refresh automatically.

permanentDelete.detailCtaAriaLabel: Delete {{name}} permanently — this action cannot be undone

countdown.title: Deleting "{{name}}"
countdown.subtitle: If you change your mind, you can still cancel.

freeze.title: Freeze "{{name}}"?
freeze.body: This storage will stop operating — it won't be able to receive or dispatch merchandise. Your team won't be able to move products within it.
freeze.safetyLine: You can reactivate it at any time.
freeze.contextBlock: You're currently working in this storage. Freezing it will switch the module to view-only mode until you reactivate it.
freeze.lastActiveBlock: This is your last operational storage. If you freeze it, you won't be able to perform any operations until you reactivate a storage.
freeze.serverError: We couldn't freeze the storage. Check your connection and try again.

archive.title: Archive "{{name}}"?
archive.body: This storage will no longer show in active views. You can consult its history and restore it any time.
archive.safetyLine: You can restore it at any time.
archive.contextBlock: You're currently working in this storage. Archiving it will switch the module to another or leave no active context.
archive.lastActiveBlock: This is your last operational storage. If you archive it, you won't be able to perform operations until you restore or create another one.
archive.frozenInfoBlock: This storage is frozen. Archiving will take it straight to history — you don't need to reactivate it first.
archive.serverError: We couldn't archive the storage. Check your connection and try again.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}" permanently?
delete.body: This action cannot be undone. The full history of the storage will be lost, including movements, records, and configuration.
delete.warningBlock: You won't be able to recover this information later.
delete.notImplemented: Feature in development. It will be available soon.
delete.serverError: We couldn't delete the storage. Check your connection and try again.

errors.freezeFailed: We couldn't freeze the storage. Try again.
errors.unfreezeFailed: We couldn't reactivate the storage. Try again.

editInFrozen.banner: This storage is frozen. You can edit its details but not operate with it.
editInFrozen.typeDisabledTooltip: You can't change the type of a frozen storage. Reactivate it first.

editInArchived.banner: This storage is archived. You can fix its details, but you can't operate with it until you restore it.
editInArchived.typeDisabledTooltip: You can't change the type of an archived storage. Restore it first.
